author: Susan "Lady D" Damon
release_boundary: Line-edited review batch. This is not final KDP upload approval.

source_files.library_source: /Users/IDC2.5/Documents/LADY D/Production Library/01 Surrendering to God's Love/01 Manuscript/Month 02 - February/Days 032-038 Manuscript.md

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Behold the Promise That Holds into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Return the divided place to the Father today; beloved identity grows where hiding ends.
edits.reason: Keeps Deuteronomy 30 return language concrete and ties beloved identity to honest surrender.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Follow the Heart That Calls You into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Let compassion gather one scattered piece today; the Father knows every place to call home.
edits.reason: Preserves the gathering/restoration theme without repeating the architecture title.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Rest in Love That Sends You into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Move from belonging, not pressure; the Father sends loved children into faithful steps.
edits.reason: Keeps the sent-from-belonging frame and avoids performance pressure.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Wake Up to Covenant Mercy into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Let the Father be kinder than disappointment taught you to expect today.
edits.reason: Turns covenant mercy into a memorable reader-facing challenge to suspicion and disappointment.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Let Fire Refine the Father's Welcome into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Name the rival love honestly today; holy welcome is strong enough to refine it.
edits.reason: Holds warning, welcome, holiness, and correction together without condemnation.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Come Home to Beloved Identity into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Receive the gift with gratitude today, then keep your heart close to the Giver.
edits.reason: Keeps fullness from becoming forgetfulness and gives the reader a concrete gratitude practice.

edits.before: Let the Father's love carry Practice Love That Finds You into one faithful step today.
edits.after: Listen for life this Sabbath; the Father forms beloved children through holy rhythms.
edits.reason: Preserves Saturday Sabbath as formation for beloved children rather than performance.

judge_auditor_loops.evidence: All 7 impact lines now vary by entry theme and avoid the repeated `Let the Father's love carry` frame.
Sabbath remains seventh-day/Saturday; commandment-keeping and obedience stay framed as response to grace.
The batch file now has zero old Volume 1 morning-impact templates.
Repo source, public mirror, and Production Library manuscript receive the same edited text.

next_loop: Continue author-voice line edits in seven-day or month-close batches, then regenerate masters/interiors and update the review site after each meaningful gate.
